transcript:
CALLER: Uh, hi. I have an appointment at 9 AM day after tomorrow and I was wondering if I can push it by an hour or so. 9 is just too early for me.
AGENT: Of course! Let me check. Your name?
CALLER: Akash Tendulkar.
AGENT: Mr. Tendulkar, I see your appointment with Dr. Sanjay Deshpande. He has 10 AM and 11 AM available that same day. Which would you prefer?
CALLER: 10:30 is ideal but... I'll take 11, that's fine.
AGENT: Moved to 11 AM. You'll get an SMS with the updated time. Anything else?
CALLER: Nope, all good. Thanks.
AGENT: See you then, Mr. Tendulkar!
